headline: The Oracle Of OMAH Wins Round One Vs. Berkshire Hathaway
summary: The Solactive VistaShares Berkshire Select Index tracks the 20 largest Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.B) holdings plus BRK.B itself. Read the full analysis here.
